stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is flying from position A (N46°30' E009°30') to B (N46°40' E009°30'). What is depicted on the VFR chart along this route?

options.a: There are two distincts mountains with peaks at 10036 ft and 9751 ft.
options.c: A valley with no significant elevation changes.
options.d: There is a mountain ridge with a peak at 10 036 ft.
